sections.paragraph: id. with suffix מַרְאֲשֹׁתֵיכֶם, Jer 13:18, יָרַד מַרְאֲשֹׁהֵיבֶם עֲטֶרֶת תִּפְאַרְתְּבֶם “there shall descend your heads (i.e. from your heads) the crown of your honour.” יָרַד is here followed by an accus. of the thing from which anything descends, like עָלָה, יָצָא. But there is nothing to hinder from reading מֵרַאֲשֹׁתֵיבֶם, like 1Sa 26:12.
